hooks.description: Validate agent-qa config exists before running agent-qa commands

hooks.command: test -f agent-qa/config.yml && echo 'Config validated' || echo 'WARN: agent-qa/config.yml not found. Run ~/agent-qa/scripts/project-install.sh to configure.'

hooks.description: Log run metadata after agent-qa commands complete

hooks.command: if ls agent-qa/20*/ >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Output folders: $(ls -d agent-qa/20*/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') | Latest: $(ls -dt agent-qa/20*/ 2>/dev/null | head -1)"; fi
